description_long: This is a streamlined, single-propeller airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage painted in a deep blue color. The wings are straight and low-mounted, extending symmetrically from the midsection of the body, and the tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer with a horizontal stabilizer at the rear. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a clear canopy. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, with minimal visible rivets or seams, and there is a subtle red and white accent line running along the side. The airplane's overall design suggests it is built for speed and agility, likely inspired by classic racing or sport aircraft.
description: A sleek, blue single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a conventional tail, and an enclosed forward cockpit. The design is streamlined with a glossy finish and subtle accent lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, single propeller at the nose, low-mounted straight wing, and the vertical tail fin with accent text.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, symmetrical wing placement, and the narrow fuselage with the cockpit canopy visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propeller, wing, and tail configuration, with visible engine exhausts and undercarriage details.
description_view_3: Front view showing the propeller, nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical wing layout with landing gear visible beneath.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
